name: Bhutan
avoid: Note: Sustainable Development Fee of ~$100/day applies

cities.name: Thimphu
cities.notes: Tashichho Dzong, Memorial Chorten and weekend vegetable market

cities.name: Paro
cities.notes: Tiger's Nest Monastery cliff hike, Rinpung Dzong and apple orchards

cities.name: Punakha
cities.notes: Punakha Dzong at the confluence of two rivers and suspension bridge

cities.name: Bumthang
cities.notes: Spiritual heartland with Jakar Dzong, ancient temples and yak cheese
